title: Da Lat, Lam Dong — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Da Lat, Lam Dong: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Da Lat is a city in Lam Dong with a population of 400,000. Vietnam’s hill station escape, known for its cool year-round climate, French colonial villas, flower gardens, and a romantic atmosphere that draws both tourists and expats.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
